channel.title: Ghost Alpha Dossier — Daily Market Intelligence
channel.description: AI-powered daily market analysis with institutional-grade signals, momentum picks, and Sam's commentary. Generated by a 16-stage pipeline. Built by Michael. Roasted by Sam.

item.title: 🟡 Dossier 2026-04-10 — NORMAL · Gold: SU
item.description:
🟡 NORMAL · SPY ▲ 0.6% · VIX 19.5

**Regime check:** VIX at 19.

🥇 Gold Pick: SU — Score: 80/100 (B)

📡 138 scanner signals across 6 strategies

"Be the person your dog thinks you are. Trade like the person your backtests think you are." — Sam

item.title: 🔴 Dossier 2026-04-07 — ⚡ Storm
item.description:
🔴 ⚡ Storm · SPY ▼ 0.5% · VIX 26.3

📡 114 scanner signals across 6 strategies

"Cut your losers fast. Let your winners run. And for the love of god, stop averaging down on garbage." — Sam
